plugins.title: Lua plugins
plugins.description: Global <0>lua-load</0> + optional <1>lua-prepend-path</1> entries. Each plugin renders as <2>lua-prepend-path PREPEND/?/http.lua</2> (when set) followed by <3>lua-load PATH</3>. Plugins registered via this list expose their <4>core.register_action</4> functions as <5>lua.<name></5> usable from a Rule's <6>lua</6> action.

upload.title: Upload Lua plugin
upload.intro: Pick an upload-target directory, name the plugin, pick a <0>.lua</0> file or paste source. The plugin lands at <1><dir>/<name>.lua</1>; a new row is added to the Lua plugins table with that path pre-filled so you only need to hit <2>Save Lua plugins</2> to wire it in.
upload.readFailed: Could not read selected file. Paste source manually.
upload.nameHint: Lowercase letters, digits, <0>_</0>, <1>-</1>. 1–63 chars, must start with a letter. Used as the filename (<2><name>.lua</2>).
upload.sourcePlaceholder: -- paste Lua source here, or pick a .lua file above

plugin.dirNotWhitelisted: dir is not in the configured whitelist
plugin.idInvalid: name must match a-z, 0-9, _, - (1-63 chars, letter-start)
